TemplateStore
nodes.description: Manages 56 categorised TTS text templates across 9 categories. Loads/saves JSON.

nodes.label: TextTemplate
nodes.description: Dataclass: name, text, category. Represents one TTS template.

nodes.label: _DEFAULT_TEMPLATES
nodes.description: 56 built-in TTS templates: 播報(8) 商業(8) 教育(7) 故事朗讀(7) 廣告行銷(6) 客服(6) 社群媒體(5) 提醒公告(5) 娛樂(4)

nodes.label: _load_template_categories()
nodes.description: Populates tpl_category_combo with all 9 template categories from TemplateStore.

nodes.label: _on_apply_template()
nodes.description: Inserts selected template text into the TTS text_input field.

nodes.label: _on_save_as_template()
nodes.description: Saves current text_input content as a custom template via QInputDialog.
